'''savate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:rubbingly|rubbingly]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-v-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:rubbingly|rubbingly]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| savate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:savate|savate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:savatesher|savatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:savatesherĂ«m|savatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:savatero|savatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:savateshĂ«|savateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:savateshĂ«m|savateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokisavatero|gokisavatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokisavateshĂ«|gokisavateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisavateshĂ«m|gokisavateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gosavankerom|gosavankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gosavankeshĂ«|gosavankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosavankeshĂ«m|gosavankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gosavankeya|gosavankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:savaterom|savaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:savatemu|savatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:savateya|savateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokisavaterom|gokisavaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisavatemu|gokisavatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokisavateya|gokisavateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:savavate|savavate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:savavatesher|savavatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:savavatesherĂ«m|savavatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:savavatero|savavatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:savavateshĂ«|savavateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:savavateshĂ«m|savavateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokisavavatero|gokisavavatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokisavavateshĂ«|gokisavavateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisavavateshĂ«m|gokisavavateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gosavavankerom|gosavavankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gosavavankeshĂ«|gosavavankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosavavankeshĂ«m|gosavavankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gosavavankeya|gosavavankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:savavaterom|savavaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:savavatemu|savavatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:savavateya|savavateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokisavavaterom|gokisavavaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisavavatemu|gokisavavatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokisavavateya|gokisavavateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:sĂŠvĂŠte|sĂŠvĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:sĂŠvĂŠtesher|sĂŠvĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sĂŠvĂŠtesherĂ«m|sĂŠvĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:sĂŠvĂŠtero|sĂŠvĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:sĂŠvĂŠteshĂ«|sĂŠvĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sĂŠvĂŠteshĂ«m|sĂŠvĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokisĂŠvĂŠtero|gokisĂŠvĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokisĂŠvĂŠteshĂ«|gokisĂŠvĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisĂŠvĂŠteshĂ«m|gokisĂŠvĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gosĂŠvĂŠnkerom|gosĂŠvĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gosĂŠvĂŠnkeshĂ«|gosĂŠvĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosĂŠvĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gosĂŠvĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gosĂŠvĂŠnkeya|gosĂŠvĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:sĂŠvĂŠterom|sĂŠvĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sĂŠvĂŠtemu|sĂŠvĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:sĂŠvĂŠteya|sĂŠvĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokisĂŠvĂŠterom|gokisĂŠvĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisĂŠvĂŠtemu|gokisĂŠvĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokisĂŠvĂŠteya|gokisĂŠvĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:safvafte|safvafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:safvaftesher|safvaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:safvaftesherĂ«m|safvaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:safvaftero|safvaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:safvafteshĂ«|safvafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:safvafteshĂ«m|safvafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokisafvaftero|gokisafvaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokisafvafteshĂ«|gokisafvafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisafvafteshĂ«m|gokisafvafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gosafvafnkerom|gosafvafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gosafvafnkeshĂ«|gosafvafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosafvafnkeshĂ«m|gosafvafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gosafvafnkeya|gosafvafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:safvafterom|safvafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:safvaftemu|safvaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:safvafteya|safvafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokisafvafterom|gokisafvafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisafvaftemu|gokisafvaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokisafvafteya|gokisafvafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
